title: Upscaled Beta Logo
description: An upscaled version of the original logo from Beta 1.4, removed in 2015.
body: This resource pack enhances the Minecraft main menu logo by replacing the current version with a high-resolution, upscaled rendition of the original logo introduced in Beta 1.4. The original logo, which featured a bold, blocky design with a slightly rough texture, has been carefully recreated in greater detail while preserving its nostalgic charm. By improving the resolution and clarity, this pack allows players to experience a cleaner, more refined version of the classic Minecraft branding without altering its original aesthetic. Whether you're a longtime player looking to recapture the feel of early Minecraft or simply appreciate high-quality visuals, this pack provides a subtle but meaningful enhancement to the game's interface.
